excerpt: The official programme page for MA in Japanese Studies lists Priority round opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2025-11-17. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline Priority Round: 17 November 2025 Final Round: 31 March 2026 Applications will be processed on a rolling basis until all places have been filled. Therefore, early applications are strongly encouraged. Applications submitted after 31 March 2026 may be considered, subject to availability of places.

matchedTextAfter: *Excluding the Postgraduate Certificate in Laws programme offered by the Faculty of Law
